summary: Excellent late‑era show with a standout second set, captured in very good audio quality.
review: Both reviewers praise this March 1990 performance as an outstanding late‑Dead concert, especially highlighting the strength of the second set. The recording is described as “very good” audio, making it a must‑have for fans despite the lack of detailed technical notes. No specific criticisms are noted.

ai_rating.rationale: High praise for both performance (especially the second set) and audio quality, but limited detail and only two reviews keep confidence at a moderate level.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the audio as "very good" with no reported issues; source type not specified.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set singled out as particularly strong; overall show deemed outstanding by reviewers.
